---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the use case or the limitation you ran into.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like MatFinder to do.

**Alternatives considered**
Any workarounds or other approaches you thought about.

**Additional context**
Anything else (mockups, references, related databases/tools).
